title: hieracium subramosum subsp. umbricola
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. umbricola, also known as a subspecies of the lesser hawk's-beard plant, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium subramosum subsp. umbricola include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
